title: prostanthera schultzii
intro: Prostanthera schultzii, also known as the Swan Coastal Tea Tree, is a plant species native to Western Australia, belonging to the family Lamiaceae. Prostanthera schultzii has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial properties, which can be attributed to the presence of essential oils such as camphor and 1,8-cineole. The health benefits of Prostanthera schultzii include relieving respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as providing relief from skin irritations and wounds. Prostanthera schultzii can be prepared as a tea, oil, or tincture, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
